title: 2 X Stainless Steel ICE Cube Clipper Tong Kitchen Utensil Tool Serving Cocktails
features: 2 X STAINLESS STEEL ICE CUBE CLIPPER TONG KITCHEN UTENSIL TOOL SERVING COCKTAILS
Made from stainless steel they are ideal for placing beside your ice bucket.
The Stainless Steel Tongs are perfect for ice cubes and can be used for serving many other small items like ice cookies and small fruit.
They feature jagged tongs for gripping ice cubes and allow excess water to drain.
